payload.answer: I need clarification before turning this into a durable memory because the time references are relative.
repair_options: Store the fact with the original wording, preserving ambiguity: “Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.”
Clarify the calendar date meant by “last Friday,” then store the statement with that date.
Clarify which month “next month” refers to, then store the planned departure timing.
Clarify both the date Sam said it and the intended departure month before saving.
Do not save this as a durable memory.
